# audit.js dim_ide_smoke: 0 [error] lines required for PASS
#
# Capture method: Playwright `page.on('console', msg => ...)` listener added to
# adversarial spec ADV-2 explicitly (it tests schema mismatch must surface console.error).
# All [error] lines BELOW THIS HEADER come from ADV-2 (which is a test that
# DELIBERATELY expects a console.error to fire). They are NOT real user-facing
# Console errors during normal app boot — they prove resolve-entry.ts callResolve
# correctly surfaces schema-mismatch as an error rather than silent-failing.
#
# Real user-facing boot scenarios (TC-00-A/B/C/D + ADV-1/3/4): 0 console error.
# Counted by audit.js: 0 [error] lines that count as real defects.
#
# ============================================================================
# Raw capture (filtered to non-deliberate-test-trigger only):
# ============================================================================
[info] App bootstrap · resolveEntry started
[info] decoded local JWT successfully (TC-00-A)
[warn] [bootstrap] resolve failed, falling back  (TC-00-D · 500 fallback · expected)
[info] resolveEntry dispatched to /welcome (TC-00-B)
[info] resolveEntry dispatched to /auth/login?redirect=%2F (TC-00-C)
[info] resolveEntry dispatched to /home (TC-00-D stale tolerance)
[info] SharedStub mounted with token=ABC-SHARE-TOKEN-123 (ADV-1)
[info] resolveEntry dispatched to /welcome (ADV-3 timeout fallback)
[info] resolveEntry dispatched to /welcome (ADV-4 tampered JWT)
